summary: Completed testing of restaurant-scoped authentication system. Verified restaurant switching behavior, customer capture fields, and token management. Found critical issues with token persistence and auth restoration.

ui_bugs.issue: Browse Menu button remains disabled even with valid phone/name input for takeaway orders

integration_issues.issue: Restaurant-scoped tokens (crm_token_509) are not persisting in localStorage when switching between restaurants
When returning to previously authenticated restaurant, auth state is not automatically restored
Cannot access /509/delivery-address page - redirects to landing page due to auth issues
Phone input validation too strict - prevents valid 10-digit numbers from enabling Browse Menu button

passed_tests: Restaurant 509 landing page loads correctly with 'Pav & Pages Cafe' name
Restaurant 675 landing page loads correctly with 'mantri' name
Customer capture fields appear for takeaway orders when not authenticated
Customer capture fields hide when switching restaurants (auth state cleared)
Restaurant switching triggers cart state clearing
Phone and name input fields accept user input correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix restaurant-scoped token persistence - tokens should remain in localStorage when switching restaurants. Fix auth auto-restore functionality so users don't need to re-login when returning to previously authenticated restaurants. Fix phone validation to allow valid 10-digit numbers. Test the complete login flow with real CRM API integration.
